calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Qian Yun Chen, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jun Wen Chen.
Mr. Fang Chan the Minor's father is also present in court.
Parties were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of of an Adult to: Kristine Chen and grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Johnny Chen.
Decree signed in open court.
